Review Text: Airdev partnered with Valize to build a sophisticated innovation tracking solution using the Bubble low-code platform, aimed at addressing the growing complexity organizations face in managing innovation portfolios. Prior to this engagement, the client struggled with tracking innovation programs effectively as they scaled, often relying on fragmented spreadsheets that lacked transparency and strategic alignment. Airdev worked closely with the client through multiple scoping sessions to understand these challenges and translate them into a structured, scalable software solution. The platform they developed allows users to map a portfolio of projects against uncertainty, evaluate strategic strength, and manage project lifecycles through defined checkpoints such as testing and assumption validation. One of the most valuable aspects of the solution is its ability to bring clarity and visibility across an organization’s entire innovation portfolio, something that was previously difficult to achieve. As a result, the client has successfully integrated the software into their existing consulting engagements and is also planning to deploy a simplified version for educational purposes and entrepreneurial use cases. Compared to a previous development partner who took over a year to deliver unusable software, Airdev demonstrated significantly higher effectiveness, delivering a working product that met expectations within a reasonable timeframe. Their strong design sense and ability to interpret high-level ideas into practical features without requiring overly detailed instructions stood out as key strengths. The team maintained a structured project management approach using tools like ClickUp and Usersnap, along with regular biweekly meetings to ensure alignment and progress tracking. While there were minor challenges related to user access configurations that required frontend rework, these issues were resolved collaboratively. Overall, the engagement has been highly successful, with Airdev proving to be a responsive, capable, and reliable development partner that delivers both strategic and technical value.

ADVISORY + TOOLS + LEARNING
